# Archived Artifacts

Frozen reference material from before this repo diverged from Lovable and pivoted to the Manta Ray Energy spec.

- `lovable/` — Lovable workspace metadata (old `plan.md`, memory snapshots).
- `prd-financepulse/` — Old FinancePulse-era PRDs. The product now follows the Manta Ray Energy spec (see `CLAUDE.md` at repo root); these are kept only for reference on components / flows that got rewritten.

**Do not edit anything in this folder.** Anything still relevant should be rewritten into the active `docs/` tree or into `CLAUDE.md`.
